description_long: This object is a military-style medal featuring a cross-shaped metallic pendant suspended from a wide ribbon. The ribbon is vertically striped in blue and black, attached at the top to a small horizontal bar with spherical finials. The cross pendant is dark metal with a circular, gold-toned center, which appears to be engraved with text and possibly a small emblem. The arms of the cross are slightly flared and end in rounded tips, with small decorative spheres at each end. The reverse side of the medal is less ornate, showing the same cross shape but with a plainer central disk. The overall design is formal and commemorative, suggesting it is an award or honor rather than decorative jewelry.
description: A military-style medal with a blue and black striped ribbon and a cross-shaped metallic pendant featuring a gold-toned center. The design is formal and commemorative, with engraved details and decorative spheres.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue and black striped ribbon and the cross pendant with a gold-toned, engraved center.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the medal and ribbon, with the spherical finials visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cross pendant and the plain central disk, with the ribbon's stripes still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slimness of the medal and the attachment between the ribbon and pendant.
